parsed_review.summary:
CP00-633 (RP20 Data Room & VDR, P06.M05 Permission And Audit Binding middle, RP20.P06.M05.S03-S12, 10 units, risk A, deliverables impl:7/security_audit:1/ui:2) is a descriptor-only closeout pack and is supported for its production_ready candidate (descriptor-verified) claim. Verified through Read/Grep/Glob only.

Scope/consistency: pack binding, requirements, no-write attestation, and the cp633_p06_permission_audit_binding_middle_descriptor in contracts/data-room-vdr-core-contract.json align with registry.js constants (DATA_ROOM_VDR_CORE_CP633_*), service.js factories, validators.js coverage/descriptor validators, the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, and README#cp00-633. The 10 rows derive correctly from P06_PERMISSION_AUDIT_ROWS.slice(2,12) (Search/Mutation/Export-download/Share/AI-retrieval decision bindings, Audit hint fields, Matched rule capture, Deny-over-allow check, Legal hold, Ethical wall); row keys and per-row extras match the contract row-by-row; deliverable counts (7/1/2) match. Plan/queue confirm live_latest_pack_id CP00-633, next CP00-634 (RP20.P06.M05.S13), with source_ledger_sha 13c7ed65... matching the manifest.

Boundaries: no-write/no-real-data/descriptor-only enforced in code — grep found no writeFile/fetch/child_process/DB/process.env in packages/data-room/src (pure projection construction) — and asserted by model.test.js (production_ready_candidate true, all executes_*_runtime false, no_write_attestation, deny_over_allow_enforced true, cross_tenant_access_allowed false, hermes emits_hermes_runtime_receipt false). The CP00-633 contract projection deepEquals package code.

Authority/Hermes: authority_boundary sets claude_is_final_approval false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening true (runtime opening deferred to CP00-634); enterprise trust claim deferred to human approval outside this receipt; Hermes packet is control-plane/descriptor-only, not product runtime. CP178+ hardening present: readiness auth preflight passed (1446-byte valid JSON, exit 0), forbidden_review_evidence/invalid_review_blockers enumerate not_logged_in/zero_byte_output/malformed_json/fenced_json_only/tool_call_shaped_output/missing fields/final-approval-claim/source-mutation/enterprise-trust, and tools are limited to Read,Grep,Glob (forbidden_tools_present false).

Validation: command-evidence.json records all 11 prompt-required commands plus extras at exit_code 0 (no_real_data true, writes_product_state false). As a read-only reviewer I did not re-execute commands; the underlying validator script (asserts coverage, hermes/claude gates, non-final-approval, handoff to CP00-634) and tests are coherent and support the recorded outcomes. Pending states in manifest (production_ready false), construction-inspection (PENDING), adjudication (pending), and claude-review-result (review_pending) are the expected pre-review states this review gates; runtime_ready remains 0 by design. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; nothing blocks pack or goal closeout.
